yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Cognizants_TriZetto_Provider_Solutions_d {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Cognizant’s TriZetto Provider Solutions data breach impacted over 3.4 million pa"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "TriZetto" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20263816__OWASP_DefectDojo_SonarQubeP {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-3816 - OWASP DefectDojo SonarQubeParser/MSDefenderParser parser.py inpu"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-3816" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "DefectDojo" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "SonarQubeParser" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3816 - OWASP DefectDojo SonarQubeParser/MSDefenderP"; content:"CVE-2026-3816"; nocase; sid:1371548; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-27689 - Denial of service (DOS) in SAP Supply Chain"; content:"CVE-2026-27689"; nocase; sid:6271259; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 5 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-29, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
